title: Founder's Associate, Growth & Operations
key_evidence: Broad founder-adjacent operator role: sales enablement, onboarding playbooks, churn/retention, funnel analytics - 'operate like a founder' - fits Ryan's generalist/FA profile
Hands-on builder of collateral (decks, case studies, onboarding guides, playbooks) - matches Ryan's content/asset-building

BUT spike fit is weak: role centres on B2B sales-funnel ops, churn analysis, recruitment ops for a VA-staffing business - NOT crypto, NOT community-led growth, NOT AI-agent building; no AI/Claude angle in JD
Wing Assistant is a virtual-assistant / outsourced-staffing company (getwingapp) - NOT an AI product company; weak domain/mission pull for Ryan
Lever workplaceType = 'remote' despite London tag - so 'London in-office' is loose; remote-friendly
Salary GBP33-55k - bottom well below Ryan's 50k floor; only top of band clears it
Posting createdAt ~Aug 2025 (~10 months old at 2026-06 run) - long-lived/evergreen req; either hard-to-fill or always-open pipeline = uncertain genuine urgency
Lever ATS with a recruiting function - moderate keyword/recruiter screen risk; mid-size company
biggest_lever: Frame Ryan's funnel work (50k email list -> 5k presale conversions via segmentation/A-B testing, 15x ROI) as directly transferable sales-enablement + activation analytics - the one area where Ryan has hard, quantified funnel results.
biggest_risk: Stale evergreen posting (~10 months) at a non-AI VA-staffing firm with a low GBP33-55k band and a sales-ops/churn focus that doesn't hit any of Ryan's spikes - low genuine desirability and unclear whether the seat is actively being filled.
recency_note: CONFIRMED STALE: Lever createdAt epoch-ms 1756241326340 = 2025-08-26, i.e. 287 days / ~9.4 months old. Evergreen/always-open VA-staffing req, not a fresh genuine opening. >12wk bracket (G=10). Validates prior ~10-month suspicion. Callback 60 -> 49.
momentum_signals: RED-ADJACENT (key): 452 open Lever roles but ~229 (>50%) are Philippines/Makati/Manila VA-staffing roles (Account Executive, AI Trainer, Accounting Assistant) — this is a high-VOLUME outsourced-staffing churn machine, NOT focused product-company growth.

EVERGREEN DEAD-SEAT: the Founder's Associate, Growth & Ops (London, createdAt 2025-08-26 = ~287 days) is the SOLE London non-VA role and has sat unfilled ~9.4 months amid 452 reqs — strong perpetual-hard-to-fill / low-genuine-urgency signal. Either always-open pipeline trap or chronically unfilled.
CANDIDATE TREATMENT: Glassdoor 3.9 across 311 reviews (mixed/OK), but reviews skew to VA/contractor experience, not corporate-FA hiring — limited read on this specific process.

NEUTRAL/UNCLEAR company trajectory: actively recruiting at huge volume (looks 'growing') but volume is staffing-supply-side, not headcount investment in the kind of role being applied for; no funding/news momentum found, no layoffs either.
Source: Lever posting API (452 roles) + WebSearch Glassdoor, 2026-06-09.
